D⁴ MDLC Cost Chain - tier_0 → tier_1 → tier_2 → tier_3 → tier_4
Tier Artifacts Role
tier_0_elicitation requirements_*.system.md PrincipalSystemArchitect specialists
tier_1_source skill.system.md, transformer.*.system.md Source and prompt inputs
tier_2_derived skill.system.yaml, skill.system.toon Generated artifacts
tier_3_execution fabric_stitch.step_N, langgraph.node_*, hook.* Runtime execution
tier_4_session session.total Aggregated session summary
No data for Cost by tier
No data for Cost by artifact
No data for Cost by vendor
No data for Cost by skill
No data for Bloat detection
No data for TOON comparison

🔗 LangGraph EXC Architecture

ACMS Execution Controller — D⁴ MDLC state flow — Mind Over Metadata LLC

ACMS_extract_wisdom — 5-step execution graph

Skill creation via PSA — 6-step elicitation + synthesis

ACMS → LangGraph Component Mapping

DEC ACMS (1984) ACMS POC (2026) LangGraph Equivalent
Task Definition Language system.md Graph state schema (TypedDict)
Application Definition Utility sync_skill.sh Graph compiler
Exchange Step fabric --pattern invocation Node function
Processing Step synthesize_eloquent_narrative Node function
Execution Controller (EXC) fabric_stitch.sh (current) StateGraph.compile()
Task group TaskGroup (planned) Graph instance
Workspace cost_audit.log Shared state dict
Audit trail ADR-009 entries State annotations + checkpointer
DECforms Marimo monitor LangGraph Studio (future)
pre_tool_call hook hooks/pre_tool_call.py Node entry point
post_tool_call hook hooks/post_tool_call.py Node exit point
task_complete hook hooks/task_complete.py END node

LangGraph State Schema (planned)

from typing import TypedDict, Annotated
from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, END
import operator

class ACMSState(TypedDict):
# Skill contract
skill_fqsn:      str
system_toon:     dict          # parsed from system.toon via Pydantic

# Pipeline execution
run_id:          str           # ADR-009 RUN_ID
task_group_id:   str           # ADR-009 TASK_GROUP_ID (planned)
step_outputs:    dict          # step_N -> output text
current_step:    int

# Cost tracking
cost_entries:    Annotated[list, operator.add]  # ADR-009 entries
total_cost:      float

# Lifecycle
hooks_executed:  list
retry_count:     int
status:          str           # running | completed | failed
error:           str | None

Roadmap — EXC Migration

Phase Current Planned
Now fabric_stitch.sh sequential bash Working POC, ADR-009 cost tracking
Phase 1 NATS JetStream events Real-time monitoring, concurrent task groups
Phase 2 LangGraph StateGraph Parallel execution, retry logic, checkpointing
Phase 3 Distributed cluster FreedomTower + TheBeast + MiniBeast

ℹ️ About ACMS Monitor

This monitor runs on deterministic mock data generated by ui/data/mock.py. The same seed value always produces the same sessions, entries, and registry records. Change the Seed control in the header to explore different data shapes. Set ACMS_DATABASE_URL in your .env to switch to live PostgreSQL automatically - the loader is transparent; the UI receives identical dict structures either way. Four mock scenarios - exercising every UI code path:
# Scenario Description
1 Happy path All four steps complete without error
2 Retry then success Step 1 fails, retries, recovers
3 Team partial fail One team member fails - non-blocking
4 Hard failure Persist fails, FAIL_TASK, session failed

AgentType Registry

AgentType Icon Vendor Model LLM call Cost
agent A Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 ✅ $0.000003/in · $0.000015/out
subagent S Google gemini-2.0-flash ✅ $0.000000375/in · $0.0000015/out
team T Google gemini-2.0-flash ✅ $0.000000375/in · $0.0000015/out
python P Ollama qwen3:8b ❌ $0.000000 - local execution
bash B Ollama qwen3:8b ❌ $0.000000 - local execution
python and bash execute locally - zero LLM cost. Token fields in live data will be 0 for these agent types. The cost engine correctly maps both to the Ollama rate card ($0.000000).

Cost Accounting Standard

Every bash utility in the ACMS pipeline includes cost accounting as Step N - a standard component, not an afterthought. Rate card (per token):
Vendor In ($/token) Out ($/token)
Anthropic $0.000003 $0.000015
Google (Gemini) $0.000000375 $0.0000015
OpenAI $0.000005 $0.000015
Ollama (local) $0.000000 $0.000000
Mock proxy: Until WorkspaceEntry carries live in_tokens, out_tokens, and cost_usd fields, the cost engine derives tokens from duration_ms using a deterministic factor (in = duration_ms × 0.4, out = duration_ms × 0.15). This proxy is replaced with zero code change when live fields arrive. TOON efficiency: Token-Optimized Object Notation delivers ~19% token reduction vs YAML on wire format - validated: 392 vs 482 out tokens on ACMS_extract_wisdom.

Future - ACMS Task Groups

Status: not yet implemented - specced here for the roadmap. A Task Group is a named collection of related sessions sharing a common business objective. Task Groups sit above sessions in the hierarchy: 
TaskGroup
  └── Session (1..N)
    └── WorkspaceEntry / step (1..N)
Planned additions to this monitor when Task Groups land:
  • Audit Trail - group sessions by task_group_id; show group-level status rollup
  • Registry - TaskGroup records alongside Task and Skill records
  • Pipeline - group selector above session selector; show group execution timeline
  • Cost - cost roll-up by task group; group vs session cost comparison
  • Cost Detail - task_group_id filter column added to drill-down table
Data model sketch:
Field Type Notes
task_group_id UUID Primary key
task_group_name str Human-readable label
task_fqsn str FK → task_record
session_ids list[UUID] Member sessions
status str pending / running / completed / failed
created_at datetime Group creation timestamp
completed_at datetime Last session completion
ARUM (Agentic Resource Utilization Monitor) integration will surface task group cost and throughput metrics as a sidecar to this monitor.
